text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I take Narita Taishin to the infirmary<n>after she
suffers an injury during<n>training.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Look, it's not a big deal. It'll probably<n>just heal on
its own.
choice_data_list: I'd rather it not get worse.
I'd rather it not get worse.
Okay! Then let's get back to training!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Look, it's not a big deal. It'll probably<n>just heal on
its own.
choice_data_list: I'd rather it not get worse.
I'd rather it not get worse.
Okay! Then let's get back to training!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh, bug off!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Do you really think I'm some frail<n>wimp?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Is it because I'm shorter than the<n>others?
Because I'm tiny and weak?<n>Is that it?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well, I don't need you to!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Why don't you stop worrying and<n>use your time
to think up a training<n>regimen?
choice_data_list: Will you rest in the meantime?
Will you rest in the meantime?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
If she agrees to rest, I'll happily think<n>up as many
regimens as she'd like,<n>but...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
No, that's not what I'm getting at! Are<n>you even
listening to me?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I don't even know why Ibother with you...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin loses her will to keep<n>arguing and
consequently agrees to<n>receive treatment for her
injury.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I decide to place my trust in her, as<n>she's
probably the person who<n>knows herself best.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hmph. Should have started with that.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
choice_data_list: Okay, clearly that injury is affecting—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh, be quiet! I can keep going!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I can keep running! I have to... keep<n>running!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I understand her impatience, but it<n>would be
dangerous to let her<n>continue.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I manage to calm her down and cut<n>training short
for the day.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... You see?
choice_data_list: Seems like your injury really is fine.
Seems like your injury really is fine.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Duh. No way in hell I'm gonna let<n>something that
small hold me back.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta do more training than<n>anyone else if I
hope to beat them.
choice_data_list: But you also need to take care of your body.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh. You're such a nag.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Whatever. Stop hounding me and let<n>me train
already!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I won't have to deal with you<n>hovering over me all
the time once I<n>get stronger.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Despite her complaints, Narita Taishin<n>finishes the
full training session.
